title: Bhajan
desc: Experience the beauty of devotional bhajans in regional languages, celebrating Hindu traditions. Let these soulful songs uplift your spirit and deepen your devotion. Tune in now!

desc: Join us for a fun devotional show that guides you on living your life in harmony with God. Discover practical tips and inspiring stories to enrich your spiritual journey!

title: Yogrishi Swami Ramdevji Maharaj
desc: Catch the special telecast of Yogrishi Swami Ramdevji Maharaj's Yog Shivir at Rajpath! Discover yoga techniques, wellness tips, and spiritual insights to enhance your health and well-being.

title: Valmiki Ramayan-Sadhvi Dev Priya Ji
desc: Sadhvi Dev Priya Ji narrates Valmiki Ramayan with devotion, wisdom, and clarity, offering spiritual insights into Lord Ram's journey, values, and dharma.

title: Aaj ka Panchang
desc: This piece explores the concept of a day in the Hindu astrological calendar, highlighting its unique significance, rituals, and how it influences daily life and spiritual practices.

title: Samudaik Prarthana
desc: Kickstart your mornings with inspiring community prayers that lift your spirits. Join us to feel motivated, energized, and ready to take on the day with positivity!

title: Swami Ramsukhdas Ji
desc: Swami Ramsukhdasji shares insights from the Bhagvat Gita, encouraging everyone to embrace spirituality and follow a meaningful path in life. Discover wisdom that inspires growth and inner peace!

title: Dada J. P. Vaswani
desc: Discover the inspiring teachings of a spiritual leader advocating for vegetarianism and animal rights. Dive into a compassionate lifestyle that promotes kindness towards animals and healthy living!

title: Shri Avdheshanand Ji Maharaj
desc: Shri Avdheshanand Ji Maharaj shares captivating stories and lessons from the Bhagavad Gita, breaking down verses to make their wisdom relatable and easy to understand for everyone.

title: Morari Bapu
desc: Join Morari Bapu in this enlightening show as he delves into spirituality and religion, providing insights and inspiration for life's deeper meaning.

title: Shrinath ji Darshan
desc: Shrinathji is a child form of Krishna worshipped at the Nathdwara temple in Rajasthan. He is central to the Pushtimarg sect, revered by Bhakti Yoga followers in Gujarat and Rajasthan.

title: Aarti
desc: Experience a heartfelt Aarti session that channels divine blessings through beautiful devotional music. Join us for a soulful journey filled with inspiring melodies and spiritual vibes.

title: Anandmurti Guruma
desc: Rejuvenate your mind and soul with the discourses filled with wisdom that would drench you in the downpour of contentment and divine ecstasy.

title: Shri Sudhanshu Ji Maharaj
desc: Spiritual leader Shri Sudhanshu Ji Maharaj shares teachings on inner peace, devotion, and the pursuit of a purposeful life through spiritual wisdom and faith.

title: Prerna Pathey
desc: Discover the timeless wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita and explore the fading art of its teachings. Dive in for some eye-opening insights that could change your perspective!
